title: AlmostUnifiedDrops
description: Unify block and entity drops using Almost Unified
body: AlmostUnifiedDrops runs AlmostUnified's unifier on all Block and LivingEntity drops. For example, if a mod makes a block or mob drop a silver ingot, instead of dropping that mod's ingot, it will instead drop the ingot from the mod with the highest priority in AlmostUnified's config.
